summary: Generated a short list of high-confidence Codex suggestion candidates for the dinobrain project by grounding on current repo state, recent GitHub PR activity, and the 2026-07-08 unfinished-improvement review. Gmail and Notion app context could not be used because both connectors require reauthentication, and Google Calendar returned no upcoming events in the checked window, so final suggestions were limited to GitHub-plus-local evidence.
decisions: Used local repo evidence and GitHub repo activity as primary signals because they were current and project-specific.
Excluded Gmail- and Notion-based candidates because the connectors failed with reauthentication/scope errors.
Excluded calendar-based candidates because no events were returned for 2026-07-08 through 2026-07-10 Asia/Seoul.
Did not suggest work on the open PR branch because PR #1 is stale relative to main and would not be an immediate relief-oriented next action.
next_steps: Return 0-3 suggestions in the required schema, prioritizing the task-lifecycle blockers and verifier-registry gaps identified in today's completion review.
If the user wants a broader suggestion pass later, reauthenticate Gmail and Notion first so email/doc signals can compete with repo-only signals.
